title: Run Node test entrypoints through one isolated Worker transport
action: Extract the proven onboarding Worker transport into one test-only asynchronous shared runner per decision a83a3613; replace the onboarding inline runner and migrate every nested Node module launch in all declared suites. The runner must execute the requested module direct-entry path, preserve argv, env, virtual cwd, optional fake home, stdin, stdout, stderr and exit status, clear inherited execArgv, and wait for exit plus both stream completions. A timeout must terminate the Worker and return { status: null, signal: 'SIGTERM', stdout, stderr, error } where error.code is ETIMEDOUT. Add a deterministic hanging-module assertion proving this shape. Mechanically propagate async only where required. Preserve every existing assertion and fixture-local source authority; do not edit production hook or CLI behavior and do not add EPERM skips.

truths: Bare model/write guard dispatches execute and retain their expected deny status and stderr.
Bee CLI examples execute the real dispatcher and retain ordered fixture state.
Onboarding and split-brain launches execute their fixture-local modules through the same shared runner.
The shared runner supports stdin, argv, virtual cwd, optional fake home, environment, output streams and exit status without child_process.
A deterministic hanging-module assertion proves timeout terminates the Worker and returns status null, signal SIGTERM, captured output and error.code ETIMEDOUT.

artifacts.substantive: single shared test-only Worker module runner
shared-runner consumer plus deterministic timeout contract assertion

key_links: every declared Node launch helper, including onboarding, calls the shared runner
Worker bootstrap sets process.argv and process.cwd semantics before importing the requested module
timeout test launches a deliberately non-terminating temporary module through the public shared-runner API
prohibitions: No assertion removal or EPERM skip
No shell emulation of Node module behavior

verify: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs && git diff --check

trace.outcome: Centralized Node test entrypoints on a serialized Worker transport that preserves argv, environment, virtual cwd, fake home, stdin, output, status, and timeout semantics without weakening assertions.
trace.friction: stale or contradictory doc: docs/history/codex-sandbox-baseline/CONTEXT.md is absent; plan.md and decision a83a3613 supplied the approved scope.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs",
    "hooks/test_model_guard.mjs",
    "hooks/test_write_guard.mjs",
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "scripts/lib/run-module-worker.mjs: shared serialized Worker runner",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs: deterministic timeout contract assertion",
    "all declared Node-only fixture launchers migrated to the shared runner with ordered async propagation"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before implementation, the mandatory configured baseline exited 1 in this Codex sandbox; the approved plan and validation recorded that nested Node fixture entrypoints did not execute and therefore could not satisfy their existing assertions.",
  "verification_run": "Exact cell command exited 0 with 722 lines of recorded output: onboarding PASS (failures 0, skipped 1), model guard ALL PASS, write guard ALL PASS, bee CLI 132 passed/0 failed, split-brain target met with zero mutation, and git diff --check clean.",
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "The onboarding suite's pre-existing case-alias fixture remains skipped on the case-sensitive /tmp filesystem; no assertion was removed or converted into an EPERM skip."
  ]
}
